title: Assistant treasurer; salary
doc_html:
§313.  Assistant treasurer; salary

The assistant state treasurer shall receive a salary as determined by the state treasurer.  

Acts 1976, No. 428, §1, eff. July 31, 1976.
doc_text:
§313.  Assistant treasurer; salary
